description: Use this API to disconnect all of the machines from the specified bus, and reconnect it to a designated bus. Bus TOBUS must not have any plant data associated with it at the time this API is called. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = moveplnt(ibus, newbus)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus on which plant data currently exists. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: newbus
parameters.description: Bus to which the plant on bus ibus is to be moved. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: IBUS and NEWBUS are the same bus.
NEWBUS already has plant data (move individual machines).
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
